title: Zwad's Create/Vanilla+
description: A simple Create/Vanilla+ modpack that focuses on enhancing performance while preserving the original game experience.
body:
## Overview ## 
This modpack was designed to seamlessly integrate the Create mod into the vanilla gameplay of Minecraft, providing an enhanced yet familiar experience. Whether you're a fan of technical builds or just enjoy adventuring, this modpack has something for you.

While the modpack is mostly focused on the Create mod it also includes some progression mods. This is mainly so that my non-technically inclined friends would stop leaving every server after one week, having completed all the goals they wanted to achieve.

## Main Mods ##
[**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric): brings innovative automation and engineering to Minecraft. With gears, belts, pulleys, and cogs, you can build complex machinery and contraptions to automate tasks and enhance your world.

[**End Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/endrem): Forces players to embark on a thorough exploration of the world before accessing the End. It adds depth and progression to the game, encouraging players to enjoy the journey as much as the destination. Make sure to check out the End Remastered mod page for detailed information.

[**Better End**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend): Adds more content to the End dimension. This mod provides new biomes, mobs, and items, giving players plenty to explore and conquer after defeating the Ender Dragon. Be sure to read the Better End mod page to fully understand its offerings.

The addition of Better End is the largest step away from vanilla Minecraft outside of the Create mod. However, I hope it won't be too controversial, as the End has always been severely lacking in content and reasons to visit outside of finding an Elytra or building an Enderman farm.

[**YUNG's Mods**](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG): Make existing structures more interesting and challenging without feeling the need to add loads of new structures that clutter the landscape.

[**Terralith**](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith): Adds new biomes and world generation without introducing any new blocks to the game. It also adds new village buildings. There are a few rare new structures, but they shouldn't feel out of place. 

[**Farmer's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight): Expands the food and farming options in the game. In combination with the Create mod, you can now build the Jaffa factory of your dreams.

## General ##
The modpack includes all the expected performance mods and comes with Complementary Shaders out of the box. The Supplementaries mod is included but configured to disable some features that felt out of place. To compensate for the extra blocks added mostly by the Create mod, Backpacks and Storage Drawers are included in the modpack.

A world map and minimap are also included, as well as a claims system, all integrated to make playing, especially on servers, easier. Chunky is included for world pregeneration, which is strongly encouraged for those running the pack on servers, as it would solve all chunk generation-related lag issues.

Many other smaller, less impactful mods are also included, but writing a description for each would be impractical. If you're interested in seeing a full list of mods, you can simply inspect the version dependencies.

_This modpack was created for personal use. Any future updates are completely dependent on my interest in playing the game at that moment in time._
